description: Enterprise Grafana home page built with the Business Text (marcusolsson-dynamictext-panel) plugin. Safe HTML/CSS/JS without disabling global sanitization. Welcome bar with live user info, interactive live search, 6 quick-action tiles, resources & documentation links, live dynamic counts, and LGTM stack versions strip.
